name: The Brewmaster
title: Proof-Prophet

abilities.name: Brotherhood of the Brew
abilities.text: After this model is dealt damage, it may drain a (t). If it does so, place this model in base contact with an ally within 6".

abilities.name: Drunken Epiphany
abilities.text: When this crew abandons a scheme, this model may search for and draw the red joker.

actions.name: Bathtub Hooch
actions.costs_and_restrictions: When this action is declared, choose if it has a range of "1" or +8".
actions.effects: This model may remove a token from the target. The target gains a Poison token.

triggers.name: Moonshine Mash
triggers.text: Remove a friendly Poison token from the target. This action deals +2 damage.

actions.name: Last Call
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Move the target up to 4". If the target has a friendly Poison token, increase the distance moved by +2".

triggers.name: A Small Favor
triggers.text: Target must have a friendly Poison token. Once per activation. Target declares an action chosen and controlled by this model.

actions.name: Drunken Clarity
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target a model with a friendly Poison token.
actions.effects: Remove a friendly Poison token from the target. Target gains an Insight token and declares the Interact action, controlled by this model.

triggers.name: "You're Drunk, Go Home"
triggers.text: This action must have received a raise. Target places itself anywhere in its deployment zone.

triggers.name: Quick Reflexes
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting a different model.

extraction_notes: Keywords section appears empty after the diamond bullet.
Devoted to the Brew ability has no visible text on this card front.
